description: The architect and the structural engineer disagree on a design detail. The PM must facilitate a resolution.

nodes.task_description: Log the design conflict in the project issue tracker.

expected_outcome.expected: The disagreement is formally documented as an issue.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a meeting with the architect and the structural engineer to discuss the conflict.

expected_outcome.expected: A meeting is scheduled to resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Document the agreed-upon resolution from the meeting and distribute it to the project team.

expected_outcome.expected: The resolution is documented and communicated to prevent confusion.
